title: Change of Ownership? 3 S&P 500 Giants That Should Consider Selling
text: U.S. Steel (NYSE: X ) announced on Aug. 13 that it was undertaking a strategic review to maximize shareholder value. Once the country's largest steelmaker, it was removed as a constituent of S&P 500 stocks in June 2014.

title: DaVita HealthCare (DVA) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: DaVita HealthCare (DVA) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.08 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.66 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.30 per share a year ago.

title: DaVita's stock gains after hours following earnings beat, outlook hike
text: DaVita Inc. DVA, -0.40% shares rose in the extended session Thursday after the dialysis center company topped Wall Street estimates, and hiked its forecast for the year. DaVita shares rose as much as 5% after hours, following a 0.4% decline in the regular session to close at $101.56.

title: DaVita Inc. 2nd Quarter 2023 Results
text: DENVER , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- DaVita Inc. (NYSE: DVA) announced financial and operating results for the quarter ended June 30, 2023. "Over the first half of the year, DaVita has been focused on innovation in our clinical systems and driving operational improvements throughout our organization," said Javier Rodriguez, CEO of DaVita Inc. "Our second quarter performance reflects strong traction across those initiatives, putting us on a path to deliver strong clinical outcomes and financial results for the year.
